title: Cost of managing tax affairs – supporting information
description: Information to provide with your objection about a cost of managing tax affairs deduction.

content_blocks.text: To lodge an objection about a cost of managing tax affairs deduction:

items: complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
provide the supporting information listed below.

content_blocks.text: Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for an objection about a cost of managing tax affairs deduction includes:

items: to whom the amount was paid
copies of invoices or statements showing the expenses incurred

whether the expense incurred was for travel to or from your tax professional, if yes we need to know where you travelled to and from how you calculated the travel expense if you will be providing copies of invoices or statements showing the expenses incurred if you will be providing written evidence of this travel (where you are not providing copies of invoices or statements).

content_text:
## How to lodge
To lodge an objection about a cost of managing tax affairs deduction:
- complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
- provide the supporting information listed below.
## Supporting information
Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for an objection about a cost of managing tax affairs deduction includes:
- the amount of each expense
- to whom the amount was paid
- the nature of each expense
- copies of invoices or statements showing the expenses incurred
- whether the expense incurred was for travel to or from your tax professional, if yes we need to know where you travelled to and from how you calculated the travel expense if you will be providing copies of invoices or statements showing the expenses incurred if you will be providing written evidence of this travel (where you are not providing copies of invoices or statements).
